title: Lobelia darlingensis

side_effects: Lobelia darlingensis, also known as Darwin's barrya, contains a toxic compound called lobeline, which can have adverse effects on the body. In severe cases, it can lead to more serious health issues, including respiratory depression and cardiovascular problems.
